ogTitle: Swanwater vs Swanwater West: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Swanwater and Swanwater West.
heading: Swanwater vs Swanwater West — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Swanwater, Victoria and Swanwater West, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Swanwater West has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Swanwater (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Swanwater or Swanwater West safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Swanwater has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Swanwater West scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Swanwater scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Swanwater West scores 47/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Swanwater or Swanwater West?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Swanwater West has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
